title: bromus hordeaceus subsp. mollis
intro: Bromus hordeaceus subsp. mollis, also known as soft brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. The soft brome has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of soft brome include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Soft brome can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is sometimes used as a natural remedy in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
